hyperedges.label: AegisOS-Agent Behavioral Mode Variants
hyperedges.rationale: Four prompt files define permission/autonomy variants of the same AegisOS-Agent, differing mainly in how much approval is required before executing actions.

hyperedges.label: Shared TTS + Notification + Security Framework
hyperedges.rationale: Every AegisOS mode reuses an identical trailing block: TTS spoken-summary directive, aegis-notify proactive notifications, and security-restriction handling.

hyperedges.label: Fable-5 Memory and Personalization Subsystem
hyperedges.rationale: These Claude Fable 5 sections jointly govern how prior-conversation memory, past-chat retrieval, and user preferences personalize responses without attribution.

nodes.label: AegisAgent (product overview)
nodes.rationale: Local personal assistant framework that operates directly on the host OS within user-configurable security guardrails; glassmorphic dashboard with real-time text and audio interaction and live browser integration.

nodes.label: agent-backend (Node/Express + Security Guard)
nodes.rationale: Boots on 127.0.0.1:6800 internal-only; refuses to start without LITELLM_KEY.

nodes.label: Dashboard (Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind 4)
nodes.rationale: Custom server on :6801 — the only exposed port; proxies /api/* and the WebSocket to the backend.

nodes.label: Lightpanda headless browser
nodes.rationale: Fast lightweight browsing via Docker CDP, wrapped as an MCP server; provides live viewports/screenshots.

nodes.label: Dynamic Security Guard (HITL)
nodes.rationale: Filters file paths and shell commands; risky commands paused for Human-in-the-Loop approval; configured via security-config.json (allowed read/write dirs, allowed utilities, auto-approve, require-approval toggle).

nodes.label: Claude Fable 5 prompt option
nodes.rationale: 1,000+ line behavioral prompt directive, stored as prompts/claude-fable-5.md.

nodes.label: AegisAgent Console Redesign Mock
nodes.rationale: Approved interactive HTML mock and source of truth for the target UI; toggle 'Design notes' for the rationale behind each decision. Implements icon rail with Console/Fleet/Connectors/Policies/Settings views.
